calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions On Appointing Successor Trustee And Appointing Successor Trust Protector
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for and with Kathy Francesio.

Ms. Francesio confirmed that it was her desire to have Lydia Graham appointed as the Successor Trustee and Kevin Urbatsch appointed as the Successor Trust Protector. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
